Center: Center of Nuclear Physics Data, Russian Federal Nuclear Center (VNIIEF), Sarov, Russia
title: Mechanism of the 7Li(p,alpha)4He reaction

x4codes.hlp: Bhabha Atomic Research Centre (BARC), Trombay, Mumbai, India
Bhabha Atomic Research Centre (BARC), Trombay, Mumbai, India

x4freetext: The targets were made by evaporating natural lithium
metal onto self-supporting carbon films of thickness
about 20 ug/cm2. The target thickness was
estimated by measuring the Coulomb scattering of
protons in a forward direction at 2.0 MeV; the
thickness used in the experiments was about 40 ug/cm2
Two semiconductor detectors of the diffused
Third detector was used as a monitor.
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases.
